completion_summary: Objective satisfied and closeout report created. reimage1804_c02 is the accepted magnetic-field-aligned NV branch; T2star is short/few-us order (~2-3 us, method-sensitive); 13C conclusion is likely weak/moderate nearby-13C-like coupling from det-shift Ramsey plus terminal CPMG target-region corroboration, without precise coupling extraction. No further default bridge work is required.
